insight: Foundation's `Lang.component(path)` runs `Variables.replaceComponent` with no audience, and the built-in `{player}` / `{player_name}` placeholders resolve to an empty string when audience is null (FoundationPlaceholders.onReplace). So calling `replaceBracket("player", name)` AFTER `Lang.component(...)` is a no-op because the token is already gone. Always pass the player name into the placeholder map at the call site: `Lang.component("path", "player", player.getName())`.
